arts.ttl: Leeds United blame game begins as Piroe fluffs his lines in Portsmouth setback
arts.sum: The defeat - United’s fourth of the league season - opens the door for Burnley and Sheffield United to jump ahead of Leeds on Tuesday. Farke said the table will tell its own story at the end of the season although admitted he didn’t want to take away from the frustration supporters will feel after the result.

arts.ttl: Pompey 1-0 Leeds: Farke to blame on Aaronson decision
arts.sum: Daniel Farke has to take the brunt of criticism for Leeds United’s 1-0 defeat at Portsmouth, despite individual moments costing the Whites at Fratton Park. A raucous home crowd backing an intense John Mousinho side, combined with Leeds missing golden opportunities, a poor refereeing display, and some uncharacteristic sub-par performances – meant that Daniel Farke was tasting defeat for the first time since November.

Portsmouth pulled off one of the surprise results of the season so far, beating league leaders Leeds 1-0 at Fratton Park on Sunday thanks to a well-taken Colby Bishop chip. Pompey have won four of the...

Nerves will be jangling in the Leeds camp heading into this derby fixture following a shock 1-0 away defeat against Portsmouth on Sunday. The Whites are now clear of Sheffield United on goal differenc...

arts.ttl: 'Two proper football clubs': Portsmouth boss hails season's best after toppling Leeds in front of 'brilliant' Fratton faithful
arts.sum: John Mousinho applauded Pompey’s best performance of the season amid a ‘brilliant’ Fratton Park atmosphere.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth shock leaders Leeds at Fratton Park!
arts.sum: Highlights of the Sky Bet Championship match between Portsmouth and Leeds United.

arts.ttl: 'Magnificent' - ITV pundit lauds Fratton Park atmosphere as Portsmouth edge Leeds United
arts.sum: Former Leeds favourite Stuart Dallas has lauded Pompey fans for the incredible atmosphere at Fratton Park.

arts.ttl: ‘Something special - thank you’: Portsmouth players send message to Fratton Faithful after Leeds United show of force
arts.sum: Match-winner Colby Bishop thanked Pompey supporters for their ‘frightening’ show of force which saw his side over the line against Leeds United.

arts.ttl: ITV forced to issue two on-air apologies during Portsmouth vs Leeds United
arts.sum: Pompey midfielder Freddie Potts was handed a booking in stoppage time, which led to ITV commentator Sam Matterface issuing an apology to viewers over language that could be heard on the broadcast. Colby Bishop scored the winning goal for Pompey to hand Leeds their first Championship defeat since November.

arts.ttl: Bishop scores for Pompey to end Leeds' 17-match unbeaten run
arts.sum: Leed United's 17-match unbeaten run in the Championship came to an end after Colby Bishop scored to earn Portsmouth a 1-0 victory at a rampant Fratton Park.
